title: Scent-Hi Scented Sachet Bags, Baby Powder Fragrance Wardrobe Sachets, Pack of 14, for Closet, Room, Drawers, Car
features: Benefit from the scent. Use these scents to dispel bad odors and purify the air, they can also be placed in any corner of your room, such as your closet, pillow, toilet. Let you enjoy the scent of nature even at home.
The scented sachets are packed in 14 sachets. Size of each sachet (approx.): 5.7 cm x 9.7 cm, 10 g. You can use them separately according to your situation.
We use high quality natural plant materials and carefully select to ensure a long-lasting.
The lightweight design with hanging rope is convenient for storing in tight corners without taking up space.

Ideal for clearing odors from closets, shoe cabinets, cars, and toilets. Ideal gifts to share with your lovers, friends, relatives. They will be an excellent birthday gift, Christmas, Wedding, Mother's Day.
description: Product description Scent-Hi Scented Sachet Bags, Baby Powder Fragrance Wardrobe Sachets, Pack of 14, for Closet, Room, Drawers, Car Safety Warning Contains natural plant materials. May cause allergic reactions in sensitive individuals. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Do not ingest.
